headline: How The Assurant (AIZ) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Analyst Targets And Q1 Trends
summary: Assurant’s updated analyst fair value estimate has shifted from US$276.83 to US$281.80, a modest 1.8% move that still matters if you are watching the stock’s valuation range closely. Recent Street commentary links these kinds of price target resets to views on underwriting execution, the mix of businesses, and how the stock compares with other insurers after first quarter results. As you read on, you will see how to track these changing targets and what they could mean for your own view of...
